# 

Publication repository for the AICR Documentation - Gen AI experimenting documentation site.

This repository contains only compiled HTML/CSS/JS. Content is deployed here
automatically by CI workflows in the
[`christophernhill/-edit`](https://github.com/christophernhill/-edit)
repository.

**Do not edit files in this repository directly.** All changes should be made in the
edit repository.

## GitHub Pages

This repository is configured to serve via GitHub Pages from the `main` branch,
`/docs` folder.
